Only Guqi Down Materials meets the conditions of net profit exceeding 10 million yuan (40.6356 million yuan > 10 million yuan) and income tax expense below 100,000 yuan (0 yuan < 100,000 yuan). In the Q3 single-quarter reports corresponding to 2024-10-16, Binhai Energy had net profit of 1.8317 million yuan and income tax expense of 1.3599 million yuan; Guqi Down Materials had net profit of 40.6356 million yuan and income tax expense of 0 yuan; Zhongda Lide had net profit of 13.3423 million yuan and income tax expense of 369,300 yuan. Only Guqi Down Materials meets the conditions of net profit exceeding 10 million yuan (40.6356 million yuan > 10 million yuan) and income tax expense below 100,000 yuan (0 yuan < 100,000 yuan). Guqi Down Materials was listed on the A-share market on 2025-05-29. On 2025-05-29, Harvest SSE STAR & ChiNext 50 Index C had a return of 12.66% over the past year and -9.01% over the past three months; Tianhong Yongfeng Steady Pension Target One-Year Holding Hybrid (FOF) had a return of 2.69% over the past year and 0.86% over the past three months. Only Harvest SSE STAR & ChiNext 50 Index C meets the conditions of having a return of more than 10% over the past year and a negative return over the past three months.
<Student Answer>：
Only Guqi Down Materials meets the conditions of net profit exceeding 10 million yuan (40.6356 million yuan > 10 million yuan) and income tax expense below 100,000 yuan (0 yuan < 100,000 yuan). Guqi Down Materials was listed on the A-share market on 2025-05-29. On 2025-05-29, only Harvest SSE STAR & ChiNext 50 Index C meets the conditions of having a return of more than 10% over the past year and a negative return over the past three months.

[Scoring Basis]

prompt: When was Huabao CSI Intelligent Electric Vehicle ETF Link C established? In the cumulative Q3 quarterly report corresponding to that establishment date, among Sentury Tire, Cambridge Technology, and Jinqiao Information, which company had the highest monetary funds? On what date was that company's 2025 Q3 report released? On that date, among the three funds China Merchants Hehui Pension Target Date 2040 Three-Year Holding Period Hybrid (FOF) A, ChinaAMC Yongfu Hybrid A, and Harvest CSI 300 Dividend Low Volatility ETF Link C, which two ranked in the top two by return over the past 3 months?
reference_response: HuaBao CSI Intelligent Electric Vehicle ETF Link C was established on November 2, 2021. According to the cumulative Q3 quarterly report data corresponding to November 2, 2021: Sentury Tire's monetary funds were 686,771,338.54 yuan, CIG Shanghai Co., Ltd.'s monetary funds were 163,798,979.71 yuan, and Shanghai Golden Bridge InfoTech Co., Ltd.'s monetary funds were 369,486,995.16 yuan. Therefore, in terms of the monetary funds indicator, Sentury Tire was the highest, and Sentury Tire's 2025 Q3 report was released on 2025-10-31. On 2025-10-31, the nearly 3-month return rates were 7.167% for China Merchants and Wells Pension Target Date 2040 Three-Year Holding Period Hybrid (FOF) A, 10.799% for ChinaAMC Yongfu Hybrid A, and -1.773% for Harvest CSI 300 Dividend Low Volatility ETF Link C. Comparing by percentile (the smaller the percentile, the higher the ranking): ChinaAMC Yongfu Hybrid A had a percentile of 0.0 (ranked 1st), China Merchants and Wells Pension Target Date 2040 Three-Year Holding Period Hybrid (FOF) A had a percentile of 0.5 (ranked 2nd), and Harvest CSI 300 Dividend Low Volatility ETF Link C had a percentile of 1.0 (ranked 3rd). Therefore, the top two by nearly 3-month return rate are ChinaAMC Yongfu Hybrid A and China Merchants and Wells Pension Target Date 2040 Three-Year Holding Period Hybrid (FOF) A.
response_final_reference: ChinaAMC Yongfu Hybrid A and China Merchants Hehui Target Date 2040 Three-Year Holding Period Hybrid (FOF) A

Therefore, the first time it exceeded 18,000,000 shares was March 31, 2025. The data on March 31, 2025 show that the three-year average return for the Bond - Long-Term Pure Bond Fund category was 0.1005%, and the three-year average return for the Index - Equity Fund category was -0.0251%. The Bond - Long-Term Pure Bond Fund category had the highest three-year average return. Huashang Wengu Tieli Bond C belongs to the Bond - Long-Term Pure Bond Fund category, so the three-year average return of its category was the highest; on 2025-09-25, the year-to-date return was the highest, at 10.01%. The specific data are: the year-to-date return on 2024-03-27 was -0.33%, on 2024-09-02 it was -4.42%, and on 2025-09-25 it was 10.01%.

reference_response: In the semiannual report corresponding to 2024-07-29 (reporting period ending 2024-06-30), Country Garden's total shareholders' equity was RMB 13,911,000,000; in the semiannual report corresponding to 2025-06-30 (reporting period ending 2025-06-30), total shareholders' equity was RMB -26,072,000,000. A higher total shareholders' equity indicates stronger net assets, so the semiannual report corresponding to 2024-07-29 had higher total shareholders' equity; on 2024-07-29, Penghua Carbon Neutral Theme Hybrid A had a past 1-month return of -8.58%, and Zhongou Medical Innovation Stock A had a past 1-month return of -1.64%. Therefore, Zhongou Medical Innovation Stock A had the higher past 1-month return; according to data updated on 2025-12-15: the category average one-year return on 2025-09-29 was 0.4315%, and the category average one-year return on 2025-11-03 was 0.3283%. The category average one-year return on 2025-09-29 was higher; according to the corresponding Q3 cumulative quarterly report for 2025-09-29 (that is, the cumulative financial report for January-September 2025): Seazen Holdings had total shareholders' equity of RMB 7.860 billion and undistributed profit of RMB 5.579 billion; Postal Savings Bank of China had total shareholders' equity of RMB 1,165.875 billion and undistributed profit of RMB 322.311 billion. Only Postal Savings Bank of China simultaneously meets the conditions of total shareholders' equity exceeding RMB 100 billion and undistributed profit exceeding RMB 300 billion, and Postal Savings Bank of China was listed on the A-share market on 2019-12-10.

prompt: What are the two release dates of the two Composite PMI data publications after 2024? Among the two release dates obtained in the first step, on which date did Huitianfu Intelligent Manufacturing Equity C have a past-1-month return rate exceeding 2%? Before the date determined in the second step, among the five companies Satellite Chemical, Shanghai Belling, Guangsheng Nonferrous Metals, Great Wall Motor, and Shentong Technology, which company held an earnings communication meeting and explicitly mentioned `better than expected` in the meeting content? Based on the company selected in the third step, what were the release dates of the first-quarter single-quarter reports corresponding to February 26, 2025 and April 4, 2025, respectively? Between the two funds Huabao CSI Nonferrous Metals ETF Initiated Link C and China Merchants CSI Baijiu Index C, which fund ranked higher in return among its peer funds in 2024? On what date was that fund established?
reference_response: The release dates of the last two composite PMI data points after 2024 were November 30, 2024 and December 31, 2024, respectively. 2024-11-30 was a non-trading day, so there was no data; the return over the most recent 1 month on 2024-12-31 was 2.241638%, exceeding 2%. Therefore, only 2024-12-31 satisfies the condition that the most recent 1-month return exceeded 2%. According to the 2024 performance communication meeting records: Satellite Chemical held a meeting on October 22, 2024, and the meeting content mentioned `better than expected` multiple times, for example, `the company's third-quarter report was actually far better than expected` and `Satellite as a whole was still relatively better than expected`; Great Wall Motor held a meeting on September 11, 2024, but the meeting content did not contain the expression `better than expected`; Shanghai Belling, Guangsheng Nonferrous, and Shentong Technology had no performance communication meeting records in 2024. Therefore, only Satellite Chemical satisfies the condition of having held a meeting with content explicitly mentioning `better than expected`; the corresponding first-quarter single-quarter report release date for February 26, 2025 was April 25, 2025, and the corresponding first-quarter single-quarter report release date for April 4, 2025 was also April 25, 2025. In 2024, the peer fund return ranking of Huabao CSI Nonferrous Metals ETF Initiated Link C was 2017 (out of 2974 ranked funds), and the peer fund return ranking of China Merchants CSI Liquor Index C was 2846 (out of 2974 ranked funds). Since a smaller ranking number indicates a higher position, Huabao CSI Nonferrous Metals ETF Initiated Link C had the higher return ranking. The inception date of Huabao CSI Nonferrous Metals ETF Initiated Link C is December 13, 2022.

On the date with the higher peer-category average one-year return, among the four companies Thunder Power, China Traditional Chinese Medicine, Fenglin Group, and Sichuan Changhong, which company had trading volume exceeding 10 million shares and turnover rate below 1%? What sector does that company belong to? What are the constituent ETFs/funds related to that sector? Are the four funds Chinese Medicine 50 ETF, Chinese Medicine ETF Huatai-PineBridge, Chinese Medicine ETF, and Chinese Medicine ETF included? If so, what were the main net inflows of the four funds on 2024-10-08, respectively? Which fund had the largest absolute value of main net inflow? `0
reference_response: The average value for 2025-10-30 (Mango Excellent Media: 101,587.14 ten thousand yuan / SG Micro: 34,323.46 ten thousand yuan / BeiGene: 113,859.60 ten thousand yuan) is 83,256.77 ten thousand yuan; the average value for 2025-05-26 (Mango Excellent Media: 76,339.75 ten thousand yuan / SG Micro: 20,083.91 ten thousand yuan / BeiGene: 44,978.40 ten thousand yuan) is 47,134.02 ten thousand yuan. Ranked by average value from high to low, the top two are 2025-10-30 and 2025-05-26; the average one-year return rate of comparable categories on 2025-05-26 was 0.0304%, and on 2025-10-30 it was 0.0243%. By comparison, the average one-year return rate of comparable categories on 2025-05-26 was higher; on 2025-05-26, LDI Technology had a trading volume of 5.3725 million shares and a turnover rate of 2.60%; China Traditional Chinese Medicine had a trading volume of 13.77 million shares and a turnover rate of 0.27%; Fenglin Group had a trading volume of 12.0986 million shares and a turnover rate of 1.08%; Sichuan Changhong had a trading volume of 81.8979 million shares and a turnover rate of 1.77%; only China Traditional Chinese Medicine simultaneously meets the conditions of trading volume exceeding 10 million shares (13.77 million shares) and turnover rate below 1% (0.27%), and the sector it belongs to is Traditional Chinese Medicine. Relevant ETFs/funds include: Traditional Chinese Medicine 50 ETF, Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF Huatai-PineBridge, Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF, Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF; on 2024-10-08, the main net inflow of Traditional Chinese Medicine 50 ETF (562390.SH) was 624,100 yuan, that of Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF Huatai-PineBridge (561510.SH) was -2.3725 million yuan, that of Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF (560080.SH) was -29.0812 million yuan, and that of Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF (159647.SZ) was -20.5735 million yuan; the one with the largest absolute value of main net inflow was Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF (560080.SH), with the corresponding indicator value of approximately 29.0812 million yuan. response_final_reference: Traditional Chinese Medicine ETF (560080.SH), corresponding indicator value is approximately RMB 29.0812 million. Evaluation standard: accurate to RMB 29.08 million is sufficient.

prompt: On which of the two dates, 2024-05-22 and 2025-01-23, did Jiugui Liquor’s turnover rate first fall below 2%? On that first date when it fell below 2%, among the four funds Ping An CSI Auto Parts Theme ETF Link A, Guotai Communication Equipment C, CITIC Prudential Multi-Strategy, and Xin Yuan CSI 2000 Index Enhanced A, which fund is a hybrid fund and has a fund size exceeding 1 billion yuan? For the selected fund, among the three dates 2025-03-20, 2025-08-20, and 2025-11-14, which two dates had the highest returns over the past 3 months? At those two dates with the highest near-3-month returns, among Asia Potash International, Feilixin, and Vanke A, which companies’ financing balances continued to grow? Among those companies whose financing balances continued to grow, in the cumulative quarterly report for Q3 2024, which company had accounts receivable below 100 million yuan and monetary funds exceeding 500 million yuan? For this company, on what date was its 2023 Q2 single-quarter financial report released?
reference_response: On 2024-05-22, the turnover rate was 2.37%, and on 2025-01-23, the turnover rate was 1.34%. Therefore, it first fell below the integer threshold of 2% on 2025-01-23. On 2025-01-23, the basic information of each fund was as follows: Ping An CSI Auto Parts Theme ETF Link A had a fund type of index - equity, with a fund size of 12.9263 million yuan; Guotai Communication Equipment C had a fund type of hybrid - partial bond, with a fund size of 7.8847 million yuan; CITIC Prudential Multi-Strategy had a fund type of hybrid, with a fund size of 1.133 billion yuan; Xinyuan Guozheng 2000 Index Enhanced A had a fund type of index - equity index enhanced, with a fund size of 94.3095 million yuan. Only CITIC Prudential Multi-Strategy simultaneously met the conditions of having a hybrid fund type and a fund size exceeding 1 billion yuan. Its return rate over the past 3 months on 2025-03-20 was 6.2413%; on 2025-08-20, its return rate over the past 3 months was 13.3396%; on 2025-11-14, its return rate over the past 3 months was 9.0647%. Among the three time points, ranked by return rate over the past 3 months from high to low: 2025-08-20 (13.34%) > 2025-11-14 (9.06%) > 2025-03-20 (6.24%). By quantile comparison: the quantile on 2025-08-20 was 0 (ranked first), the quantile on 2025-11-14 was 0.5 (ranked second), and the quantile on 2025-03-20 was 1 (ranked third). Therefore, the two time points with the highest return rates over the past 3 months were 2025-08-20 and 2025-11-14. Yaka International (2025-08-20: 722,906,194 yuan → 2025-11-14: 736,803,598 yuan), and Feilixin (2025-08-20: 441,474,340 yuan → 2025-11-14: 442,717,926 yuan). The financing balances of both companies showed a continuous growth trend during this period. According to the cumulative quarterly report data for Q3 2024, Yaka International had accounts receivable of 35.0909 million yuan (below 100 million yuan) and monetary funds of 700.1239 million yuan (above 500 million yuan); Feilixin had accounts receivable of 692.3106 million yuan (above 100 million yuan) and monetary funds of 61.7340 million yuan (below 500 million yuan). Only Yaka International simultaneously met the conditions of accounts receivable below 100 million yuan and monetary funds above 500 million yuan; Yaka International's single-quarter financial report for Q2 2023 was released on 2024-08-30.
